arts.ttl: Danny Cowley outlines key factor behind Colchester's impressive defensive record
arts.sum: “The boys at the front end of the pitch play with such an energy and intensity that even when the ball does come forward, it doesn’t come forward with the same quality. The U’s head to MK Dons on Saturday aiming to extend their unbeaten run in League Two to nine matches and continue the fine form which has seen them establish themselves one of the division’s best defensive teams.

MK Dons' season goes from bad to worse. Following their 2-0 defeat to Bradford, they have now won just two of their last 15 games. Colchester have now gone unbeaten in their last eight games followin...
